blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Fresh authenticated orgs still have no browser-visible path to a linked real study cohort; pack detail shows “No studies linked to this pack” and visible study navigation still reaches only the demo 3-variant personas route.

appliedUpdates.description: Recorded persona-engine rerun findings: Import Pack UI now validates VAL-PERSONA-028, audit trail now exposes Last modified by for VAL-PERSONA-067, and VAL-PERSONA-057 remains blocked because fresh orgs still lack a browser-visible linked study cohort.
